text: Delivered Svds.gsvd (full-column-rank pure scope per parity §9): stacked thin QR of [A;B], A-block Gram CS decomposition on the symmetric kernel with DIRECT column norms c=|Q1 w|, s=|Q2 w| (avoids the sqrt(1-c^2) cancellation — reviewer confirmed the raw-vs-normalized scaling is a benign 1/r~1 factor), U=Q1WC^-1 exactly unit-norm, X=Rt W, typed GeneralizedSingularValue ordering (descending ratio, Infinite first via typed +inf key — no NaN — Zero last, index tie-break = total order), undetermined columns zeroed + documented, snap tol 1e-9, RankDeficient boundary reusing the QR rank tolerance (early m+p<n path documents the bound-not-measured rank). New GeneralizedSVD result type (SVD idiom). Review: no bugs; closing items applied (nontrivial-X + Infinite&Zero joint reconstruction test, repeated-Infinite determinism test, residuals-are-CS-defect doc, bound-rank comment). Verified: coreJVM 285/285, coreJS 282/282, laws 17/17 both, parity 29/29. ALL v0.3.5 implement beads now closed — spectral-laws unlocks.
